failure.message: One or more child tests had errors
One or more child tests had errors
One or more child tests had errors

test-case.name: LaunchTestWithEnumeratorPasses

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] Gaze Interactor not set or missing on ScanInteractableObject (UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Gaze.XRGazeAssistance). Disabling this XR Gaze Assistance component.'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: Could not find a device that supports eye tracking on Awake. Gaze Interactor (UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Samples.StarterAssets.GazeInputManager) has subscribed to device connected events and will activate the GameObject when an eye tracking device is connected. Scenario files used in the scene SampleScene and added to the build: Assets/Oracle_InObjectScene.xml Assets/Oracle_Colission.xml Assets/Oracle_MoveObjectToOrigin.xml Assets/Oracle_Teleportation.xml Assets/Oracle_OutSceneTeleportation.xml Assets/Oracle_Selection.xml Mesh 'Plane' has more materials (2) than submeshes (1) 🚀 Initialisation of the test suite 📢 StartNextChild() called - Actual Index : 0 No Camera Floor Offset GameObject specified for XR Origin, using attached GameObject. ▶ Activation of ScanInteractableObject 🎬 ScanInteractableObject initialised ! ➡ ScanInteractableObject begins his interaction ! Total Interactable objects in scene: 16 Gaze Interactor not set or missing on ScanInteractableObject (UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Gaze.XRGazeAssistance). Disabling this XR Gaze Assistance component. Hand Tracking Subsystem not found or not running, can't subscribe to hand tracking status. Enable that feature in the OpenXR project settings and ensure OpenXR is enabled as the plug-in provider. This component will reattempt getting a reference to the subsystem each frame. The FoundObject.txt file has been written. Torus Interactable: (2.51, 1.19, -2.98) Arch_Interactable: (2.49, 0.71, -2.13) Sphere Interactable: (3.25, 2.81, 0.50) Cube Interactable: (2.51, 1.40, -2.98) Tapered Interactable: (2.50, 1.60, -2.98) Spatial Panel Manipulator Model: (0.44, 0.93, -1.83) Tapered Interactable: (2.51, 0.99, -2.98) Cylinder Interactable: (2.15, 1.16, -2.98) Spatial Panel Manipulator UI Examples: (-0.45, 0.93, -2.35) Blaster: (2.61, 0.95, -0.16) Amount of object found : 10.00 objects/minutes. ✅ ScanInteractableObject has terminated his execution ! ⏹ ScanInteractableObject finish ! - Moving on to the next child ➡ Launch of the next child : Simple Teleportation 📢 StartNextChild() called - Actual Index : 1 No Camera Floor Offset GameObject specified for XR Origin, using attached GameObject. ▶ Activation of Simple Teleportation 🎬 Simple Teleportation initialised ! ➡ Simple Teleportation begins his interaction ! Gaze Interactor not set or missing on Simple Teleportation (UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Gaze.XRGazeAssistance). Disabling this XR Gaze Assistance component. 🚀 Téléportation of the player Trying to teleport at : (5.02, 1.39, -7.20) [UnitySingleton] An instance of InriaTools.SeparateThread is needed in the scene, so '(singleton) InriaTools.SeparateThread (UnityEngine.GameObject)' was created with DontDestroyOnLoad. Amount of object found : 0.00 objects/minutes. The amount of objects found drop to zero, stop the scanning Trying to teleport at : (2.07, 1.39, -9.64) TestGenerated - Teleportation ORACLE CanTeleport - TestPassed - Teleportation successfully done at (0.00, 0.00, 0.00) Trying to teleport at : (-9.25, 1.39, 1.67) TestGenerated - Teleportation ORACLE CanTeleport - TestPassed - Teleportation successfully done at (2.07, 1.39, -9.64) Trying to teleport at : (0.07, 1.39, 9.64) TestGenerated - Teleportation ORACLE CanTeleport - TestPassed - Teleportation successfully done at (-9.25, 1.39, 1.67) Trying to teleport at : (-2.05, 1.39, 8.11) TestGenerated - Teleportation ORACLE CanTeleport - TestPassed - Teleportation successfully done at (0.07, 1.39, 9.64) ✅ Simple Teleportation has terminated his execution ! ⏹ Simple Teleportation finish ! - Moving on to the next child ➡ Launch of the next child : Teleportation Outside scene 📢 StartNextChild() called - Actual Index : 2 ▶ Activation of Teleportation Outside scene 🎬 Teleportation Outside scene initialised ! ➡ Teleportation Outside scene begins his interaction ! This is supported, but may not be intended since interactors and interactables are not able to interact with those registered to a different manager. You can use the Window > Analysis > XR Interaction Debugger window to verify the interactors and interactables registered with each. The default manager that interactors and interactables automatically register with when None is: SampleScene/XRInteractionManager ▶ Activation of Move Object To Origin 🎬 Move Object To Origin initialised ! ➡ Move Object To Origin begins his interaction ! 🚀 Téléportation of the player Trying to teleport at : (-2.98, 0.28, 8.11) Cube position: (-2.98, 0.28, 8.11) TestGenerated - CollisionDetection ORACLE CollisionDetection - TestPassed - Collision successfully done with Spatial Panel Manipulator Model at: (0.44, 0.93, -1.83) Cube position: (0.44, 0.93, -1.83) Trying to teleport at : (-0.51, 0.28, 2.62) ORACLE MoveObjectToOrigin - TestGenerated ORACLE MoveObjectToOrigin - TestPassed - Blaster was moved to the origin.
